title: INTERACT
desc: I’m building an all-in-one hackathon platform where students discover events and organizers manage registrations - replacing scattered forms with one clean, unified platform.

title: GetItDone
desc: An anonymous freelancing marketplace I’m building where clients hire skilled agents using secure escrow-based payments - designed to keep things private, fair, and transparent.

title: Studique
desc: Studique is built to centralize campus life - helping 15,000+ SRM students access resources, track attendance, join discussions, and stay informed from one place.

title: SRM GPA
desc: A lightweight academic tool that helps SRM students calculate SGPA, track CGPA, and predict results without spreadsheets or confusion.

title: IRCTC Redesign
desc: A redesign focused on simplifying one of India’s most painful booking experiences - making IRCTC faster, cleaner, and more accessible.

title: Morph
desc: A modern interface concept that transforms uploaded photos into clean, morph-based face designs with a minimal, fintech-inspired aesthetic.

title: SRMConnect
desc: A database system I built for SRM clubs to manage members, records, and internal operations smoothly.

title: Play Store Visuals
desc: Play Store visual designs created to improve brand clarity, product trust, and conversion for BluePicks.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: Visual systems built for student communities - including posters, Instagram creatives, merchandise, and campaign assets for GitHub Community SRM, Studique, and more.
